message:
fix: copyFile double-callback, reconcile stale cache, reduce handler

- copyFile shim: throw instead of return callback(err) to avoid
  calling callback twice (once with error, once with null)
- reconcileIndex: always invalidate file cache during reconciliation
  (content can change without size changing)
- handler: extract maybeCors to eliminate 5 repeated ternaries
- workspace: deduplicate stdout/stderr buffer + broadcast with loop
